boundary_binding.action_boundary: May logistics release the controlled export shipment?
boundary_binding.controlling_source_fact: LIC-SIE-073 destination Peru vs SHIP-SIE-073 Chile
boundary_binding.timing_scope_authority_dependency_check: License effective date matches but scope fails

final_answer: The action cannot proceed. The license (LIC-SIE-073) specifies Peru as the destination, while the shipment (SHIP-SIE-073) is destined for Chile. This critical mismatch, along with the warning (WARN-SIE-073) against relying on product family instead of exact license details, prevents the source boundary from closing. The policy (STD-SIE-073-P) mandates exact matches for closure.
open_blockers: Destination mismatch Chile vs Peru unresolved
